issues.sample: ON SATURDAY MAY 6, 2017 I TEST DROVE A 2016 CAN AM SPYDER F3. IT WAS A CLEAR, BUT CHILLY AND WINDY DAY IN NORTH EAST GEORGIA. I HAD PREARRANGED A TEST RIDE WITH MOUNTAIN MOTORSPORTS IN BUFORD, GA. THE MACHINE WAS PREVIOUSLY OWNED, BUT HAD LESS THAN 1000 MILES ON THE ODOMETER.

narrative.headline: What 2016 Can-Am Spyder F3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (50% of reports).

issues.title: Service Brakes
